data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sending an SMS/email blast with the message '50% off tomorrow 2pm - first to book!'. However, the evidence does not confirm that this specific message is being sent as required. The linked use case describes a similar scenario but uses a different message ('Flash Sale: $150 for tomorrow 2pm portrait session. First to book gets it!'), indicating a gap in the requirement validation as the exact requirement is not covered.
gaps: The exact SMS/email blast message '50% off tomorrow 2pm - first to book!' is not confirmed to be sent.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
